title: carex dolomitica
intro: Carex dolomitica, also known as dolomite sedge or Carex, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carex dolomitica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
